name: Lost Balls
short_description: Outsmart ruthless gangsters in a high-stakes portside chase! This third-person shooter challenges you to collect every lost golf ball, run, quick reflexes, and, when necessary, your weapon to survive the relentless pursuit.
detailed_description:
Lost Balls: In Search of Lost Balls

Lost Balls: In Search of Lost Balls is a thrilling TPS genre game. Players take on the role of Vincent, a golf course worker in the midst of a midlife crisis, who must find lost golf balls while avoiding gangsters in a dark and atmospheric harbor setting.

Exciting Story Mode

By clearing the story mode, you can watch an ending video containing a hidden story.

Endless Challenge in Infinite Mode

In infinite mode, you can test your limits and record the highest score by continuously clearing stages while avoiding the gangsters' interference.

Key Features

Thrilling Action

Experience a tense chase unfolding in a dark harbor.

Unique Main Character

Follow the interesting story of Vincent, a golf course worker experiencing a midlife crisis.

Gangster Threats

Avoid unique gangsters and collect lost golf balls.

Various Game Modes

Feel the diverse fun through story mode and infinite mode.

Your only skill is to use the minimap to figure out the location of your enemies.
